description: I love using 7shifts for checking my work schedule and keeping track of my shifts. It's so easy to see my schedule as well as events that are happening on my work days. The chat function is also great because I can send private messages or a group message to other people to see if they'd like to switch shifts. Gone are the days of email attachments with work schedules. I'm so happy that my workplace uses 7shifts!
author: Hannah V.
pros: All the information I need to know for my work shifts is in one place: days I'm working, who I'm working with and special work events happening that day. It's easy to contact people to switch shifts because I know who is and isn't working on specific days.
cons: There isn't really anything I don't like about 7shifts as it gives me all the information I need for my weekly schedule in one place.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked how it was very easy for associates to submit shift swap requests and for managers to approve them. Same with RTO requests, very easy to use. Additionally, I liked how managers could post announcements and there was also a direct message feature.
cons: I really can't think of anything I disliked about 7Shifts. I think the app is very user friendly and easy to use!

description: Working in restaurant is the only experience I’ve had with this app. It worked well enough to get the job done.
author: Oliver M.
pros: Easy to swap shifts, easy to keep record of shifts and swaps as well as floating shifts for pickup when available.
cons: A lot of clutter, but generally works well. Wish there was a better shift swapping system for multiple shifts.

review_title: Easy to Use and Manage Multiple Employee Schedules
author: Andrena T.
pros: 7shifts makes it really easy to manage schedules, time off request, manage labor hours and easily allows you to communicate with all teams.
cons: I didn't have any issues using 7shifts, sometimes that mobile application wouldn't load but was easily and quickly fixed. I assume it was due to updates.

description: 7shifts did make reviewing and trading shifts fairly easy for myself and others. While we did not use to platform for much other than shift information, it was very helpful in the aspects in which I used it.
author: Noah M.
pros: I liked that 7shifts made it very easy for myself and fellow employees to review and even share shifts.
cons: There were times that the information was not up to date regarding shift availability that led to some shifts getting mixed up.

description: Staff appreciate the ability to easily view their schedules, request time off, and trade or pick up open shifts directly through the app.
author: Cory R.
pros: Built-in messaging, group chats, and announcement features streamline team communication, reducing the need for multiple apps, phone calls, and texts.
cons: Users report occasional performance issues, such as slow loading times, random logouts, and server crashes that can disrupt clocking in.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Super easy to use, easy to pick up open shifts, easy to give hits away, easy to track hours worked and pay per day
cons: Scheduling display is somewhat hard to use and follow, can be confusing when looking at future schedules

description: overall, great experience. Much easier that texting and missing a response or not being able to keep track of the responses.
author: Elizabeth H.
pros: Hi, I really like 7shifts for my waitressing job. Whenever i have a shift that i can trying to get covered, I just post it here.
cons: there really isn't anything i don't like about it. its easy, efficient, and timely. all things i need for this type of app.

description: My overall experience with 7 shifts so far has been nothing shy of spectacular. It truly is a great program
author: Crystal E.
pros: I love the ease and convenience of this system. Everything is right there in your fingertips. I love how easy it is to communicate and navigate the system
cons: I honestly have no negative opinions about 7 shifts. It is a great platform for employers and employees
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A good tool but need a bit of improvement
description: 7shifts keeps my team organized with easy scheduling, but occasional glitches slow things down and can be stressful
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really like how 7shifts makes scheduling simple and clear. It has great communication and easy shift swaps
cons: 7shifts works well, but notifications can be delayed and the app sometimes runs a bit slow which makes the experience less enjoyable

review_title: A Huge Lifesaver for Our 250-Seat Restaurant
description: I really love the 7shifts people. They are passionate about what they're doing, super engaged with customers and always working to make us happy. They are a tech company that is really keeping the customer's needs in mind and working to make our lives better/easier. At this point I couldn't fathom losing the 7shifts toolkit at Prairie Dog Brewing.
author: Gerad C.
pros: 7shifts is really geared toward restaurant shift/labour management and communications, whereas so many of the other scheduling softwares out there try to fit the general case and don't handle the high-paced, dynamic nature of restaurant staffing nearly as well. From our perspective, 7shifts literally cuts down 5-10 hours a week of admin time, while also providing us a convenient, central location for communication with staff, basic HR data, etc. We use the free 7punches app to track time punches, which also has some nifty features that help us manage labour costs and keep better tabs on things like lateness. What I'm most excited about now is 7shifts' built-in "Optimal Labor" tool, which combined with our POS sales integration, provides me with HOURLY forecasts for my sales on given upcoming week, then tells me how many servers, bartenders, etc it thinks I should have on based on my sales, labour targets and past scheduling. It's not perfect, but its hugely helpful and lightyears ahead of what we were doing in the past, taking only a fraction of the time. 7shifts is a tech company that really gets restaurants and what we need, I eagerly anticipate every update to the software. I'm a techno-geek at heart, with my own tech industry experience, and by working with the 7shifts people and products, I immediately see a really healthy, creative tech culture at the company, which are poised to keep moving at a phenomenal pace and quality of output.
cons: I wish we could get the Machine Learning auto-scheduler feature at "The Works" package level, even as a priced add-on. Currently the only way to get it is to sign up for a massively more expensive package that is really designed for franchise chains with many locations to handle. We have just one location, but really want the auto-scheduler (it's absolutely brilliant). I love the 7shifts web API and use it for quite a lot of our own software, but the documentation is really incomplete/out of date and I have to do a lot of reverse engineering either from their website or by making educated guesses. I can imagine that this might cause some friction or limit the abilities of third parties to integrate with 7shifts. Third party integrations have not been as robust or full-featured as I'd hoped, at least the TouchBistro/7shifts integration, but I think that's more due to the other side of the integration than the 7shifts people.

review_title: Stacked and Folded Social House Review of 7Shifts
description: Overall it is a solid product, very happy with it!! I feel it blows Hot Schedules out of the water!!
author: Chris R.
pros: Ease of use, lay out, certain reports. Ease for staff to communicate and input their availability and time off requests. It is user friendly on the front end.
cons: Better labor forecasting, actual v forecasted, Day part labor separation ( lunch v dinner) and real-time labor v forecasted v last week ( or last quarter or last year). Being able to break down the sales by day part along with labor would be fantastic. Also the "optimal labor" tool is pretty weak and the graph used is not helpful. Tip pooling or tip reporting enhancements. I have three cashiers on, having them the program able to split up the group tips by hours worked on that shift.

review_title: Great product, and the price is so affordable
description: The best piece to me was taking scheduling, time off requests, availability, and budgeting and putting them into a single piece of software.
author: Shannon S.
pros: I loved getting to a digital schedule that I could easily push notifcations to my employees. It really streamlined the schedule process for my business and allowed me to simplify several processes into one.
cons: I was very happy with the software, however the only thing that made me switch was to get as many things under a single software suite as possible. We now use square for POS, scheduling, time tracking, payroll management, etc.

description: Easy and convenient to use. View schedule and swap shifts
author: Sahan R.
pros: East to navigate, swapping shifts was easy as well as requesting time off
cons: Didn’t synch with my calendar at times, wouldn’t give me the option to do so

description: I used 7shifts when I worked part-time at a restaurant. It was very easy to use and none of my colleagues and I complained about the service.
author: Alexis R.
pros: Very user friendly, efficient for what I needed in a scheduling platform.
cons: I have nothing negative I can report. It was very intuitive.

description: Difficult and frustrating and confusing and hard
author: Louise D.
pros: Easy to use online only and not through the app
cons: Using through the app is confusing and very frustrating

description: Great experience overall with 7shifts including support.
author: Brandon M.
pros: Easy to use, clean UI and its feature rich for any business.
cons: EWA integration could be better and more user friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Time tracking for the right job
description: Works for time and project tracking, but is not really for us.
author: Carl D.
pros: Works well for time and project management
cons: Kind of pricey for a small team, and has a lot of features we don't need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Adalberto U.
pros: I like the interface and the ease of use.
cons: Lack of options compared to other softwares, in my opinion.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: As easy as it can get. Just give it a try.
author: Kendrick N.
pros: Easy to set up, add employees and wages.
cons: Nothing to dislike, this app has everything I need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Clock in and clock out simply
description: I love it. Its simple to use and highly recommended and very easy to use
author: Jessica C.
pros: I like how it simple to use. Just type in your employee id and password and click the clock on, clock off button. You get paid for the work youve worked hard for
cons: I forgot my password when i first started working an my login was locked. So i had to write my times. But i got paid the same if i were to clock in on the computer
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy, accessible, quick,multifunctional toll done GREAT
author: Katelynn A.
pros: Seeing the schedule, access to your pay stub and seeing how much you made after your shift with tax taken out ( depending on your state) Notifications when schedule changed. Notifications when your shift starts in an hour 🙌, access to pay stubs easily, you can see whos scheduled when and get their contact as needed . Also great for communication between the team!
cons: Not sure if its something on our end ( probably is) but we changed systems and now use spot on . And we no longer can connect timesheet or or see the paystubs.. cant verify vlock in. Its not connected. Weve been told it will take 2 weeks to transfer everything over and its been over 2 - 3months . Not sure if thr system we use doesnt want to connect or if its something on our admin office end .
author_profession: Marketing director, host manager, supervisor of restaurant

description: Having used several different scheduling softwares in the past, 7Shifts is by far my favorite. It's easy to use, has a really wonderful app, and is constantly adding new features, all at a really affordable price. The support team is always available and can answer any questions.
author: Laura C.
pros: 7Shifts is intuitive and sleek. Compared to other software we've used in the past, both the webpage and app provide quick syncing with our POS and offer a wide variety of features- from logbook notes, customizable and scheduled tasks lists, and shift swapping abilities.
cons: We would love to see even more customizable options, especially with the new tasks list feature (such as temp range options/recall ability, reminder emails, etc).

description: Very positive, great product with great support.
author: Warren S.
pros: Integrates to my POS to track time and clock ins. Easy to learn and easy to set up and easy to use. It has reduced the time I spent scheduling by 90%. Tasks, log book and communication is something I could not live without.
cons: More customizing features on tasks would be nice. As well as being able to customize reasons an employee left when you archive.

description: I would say my overall experience is a 10/10! Such a fantastic software and so user friendly. I have used this software for over two years and have yet to find an issue.
author: Jessica G.
pros: A major pro for me is that you can update all shift times, sick calls and building changes on the spot and it gets sent out to everyone. That way all employees stay updated as to where everyone is and what time they are available.
cons: I would be very honest if there were cons about this software, but there is not! We went from making our schedules in an excel doc and this has been an amazing change!
